title: The Stinky Cheese Vacation
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is tricked by his stingy uncle into fixing up a crumbling castle — and ends up finding a stinky cheese treasure! 🧀

q.en: Who sent Geronimo the gloomy letter tied with a black ribbon?
q.zh: 是谁给杰罗尼摩寄来了用黑丝带系着的阴沉信件？

options.zh: 他的叔叔萨缪尔·斯丁斯诺特

explain.en: Geronimo finds the signature at the bottom of the letter: 'Samuel S. Stingysnout,' who is described as the stingiest rodent on Mouse Island and Geronimo's uncle.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩在信底部看到了署名“萨缪尔·斯丁斯诺特”，书里说他是老鼠岛上最小气的老鼠，也是杰罗尼摩的叔叔。

q.en: Where does Uncle Stingysnout live, and on what hill does his castle sit?
q.zh: 斯丁斯诺特叔叔住在哪里，他的城堡又坐落在哪座山上？

options.en: Penny Pincher Castle, on Cheap Change Hill
options.zh: 佩妮·平彻城堡，坐落在廉价零钱山

options.en: A hotel in New Mouse City
options.zh: 老鼠新城里的一家旅馆

options.en: A cabin in the Grand Canyon
options.zh: 大峡谷里的一间小木屋

explain.en: The letter says Uncle is waiting 'at Penny Pincher Castle, the Stingysnout family home,' and on the trip Geronimo sees 'Cheap Change Hill, the craggy peak where Penny Pincher Castle sits.'
explain.zh: 信里说叔叔在“佩妮·平彻城堡，斯丁斯诺特家族的宅邸”等他；旅途中杰罗尼摩看到了“廉价零钱山，也就是佩妮·平彻城堡所在的崎岖山峰”。

q.en: What did Uncle Stingysnout claim in his letter to make Geronimo rush over?
q.zh: 斯丁斯诺特叔叔在信里声称了什么，让杰罗尼摩急匆匆赶过去？

options.en: That he was about to die (his death was coming soon)
That he had won the lottery
That he had opened a new hotel

explain.en: The letter reads: 'I am informing you of my impending departure from this world (and by this I mean my death, which is coming very, very soon!).'
explain.zh: 信中写道：“我要通知你，我即将离开这个世界（也就是说我很快、很快就要死了）。”

q.en: After the first garden request, how many more 'teeny, tiny last requests' did Uncle say he had?
q.zh: 在第一个花园请求之后，叔叔说他还有多少个“小小的最后请求”？

explain.en: Uncle first says he has just one request, then quickly adds: 'Actually, it's seven little things!' — polishing his coffin, fixing his car, finding his will, sewing his suit, cooking dinner, and getting the castle ready, plus the garden.
explain.zh: 叔叔起初说只有一个请求，紧接着又飞快地说：“其实，是七件小事情！”——包括擦亮棺材、修车、找遗嘱、缝寿衣、做丧宴、布置城堡，再加上花园。

q.en: Which detective friend helped renovate the castle and installed the alarm system?
q.zh: 哪位侦探朋友帮忙翻修城堡，并负责安装了警报系统？

explain.en: The text says: 'Hercule Poirat is a detective, so he worked on installing the ALARM system.'
explain.zh: 书里说：“赫拉克·波拉是名侦探，所以他负责安装警报系统。”

q.en: Which adventurous mouse fixed the shingles on the castle roof?
q.zh: 是哪只爱冒险的老鼠修好了城堡屋顶上的木瓦？

explain.en: The book says Bruce Hyena 'isn't afraid of heights... So he fixed the SHINGLES on the roof.'
explain.zh: 书中说布鲁斯·鬣狗“不怕高处……所以他修好了屋顶上的木瓦”。

q.en: Who arrived at the castle thinking it was a fancy hotel, and was the most famous singer on Mouse Island?
q.zh: 谁来到城堡，把它当成了一家高级旅馆，而且还是老鼠岛上最有名的歌手？

explain.en: A blonde rodent in the latest style enters and Geronimo recognizes her: 'It was Faith Fancyfur, the most famouse singer on Mouse Island!'
explain.zh: 一位穿着时髦的金色毛发女鼠走进来，杰罗尼摩马上认出了她：“那是费丝·花毛，老鼠岛上最有名的歌手！”

q.en: In the library, how did Geronimo discover the scroll that turned out to be a treasure map?
q.zh: 在藏书室里，杰罗尼摩是怎样发现那卷后来被证明是藏宝图的卷轴的？

options.en: He fell, hit a desk, and triggered a hidden drawer
options.zh: 他摔了一跤，撞到书桌，触发了一个隐藏的抽屉

options.en: He found it inside the freezer
Uncle handed it to him directly
options.zh: 叔叔直接把它交给了他

options.en: It was mailed to him the next day
options.zh: 第二天有人把它寄给了他

explain.en: While climbing a broken ladder, Geronimo fell onto a desk, which 'activated a HIDDEN mechanism... a SECRET drawer. The drawer had opened, and inside was a rolled-up SCROLL!'
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩爬坏梯子时摔到书桌上，“触发了一个隐藏的机关……一个秘密抽屉弹开了，里面是一卷卷起来的卷轴！”

q.en: Where was the treasure actually hidden, at the 'bottom of the bottom'?
q.zh: 宝藏真正藏在哪里，也就是“最底层的底部”？

options.en: Beneath the stone floor of the cellar

explain.en: The cheese-wedge symbol was carved into the cellar floor and only visible from the stairs above; they dug up a wooden chest 'at the very bottom of the bottom' beneath the stones.
explain.zh: 奶酪楔子的符号刻在地窖的石板地上，只有站在上方的楼梯上才看得见；他们在石头底下“最底层的底部”挖出了一只木箱。

q.en: What was the stinky treasure inside the chest?
q.zh: 木箱里的臭臭宝藏究竟是什么？

options.en: Ten wheels of vintage Truffled cheddar cheese dated 1313
options.zh: 十个标有1313年的陈年松露切达奶酪轮

explain.en: Inside the chest were 'ten perfectly identical wheels of vintage cheese. Each wheel had the date 1313 stamped on it... Truffled cheddar (Extra-stinky).'
explain.zh: 箱子里有“十个一模一样的陈年奶酪轮，每个都印着1313年的字样……松露切达（格外刺鼻）”。
